name: Claude Limit Skill
description: A skill for managing and tracking token usage limits in Claude conversations
author: rizadaniel2-cozy-ritual

tools.name: set_token_limit
tools.description: Set a maximum token limit for conversation tracking

tools.name: reset_usage
tools.description: Reset the usage counter to zero

tools.name: get_usage_report
tools.description: Get a detailed usage report with breakdown
